/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/v4l2_video.dir/src/v4l2_video.cpp.o -o v4l2_video  /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/librockchip_mpp.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libgstapp-1.0.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libgstbase-1.0.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libgstreamer-1.0.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libgobject-2.0.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libglib-2.0.so
